Verified machine labor needs proof settlement.

A prestigious, public-safe front door for AGIJobManager: contract identity, Evidence Docket, read-only operator planning, verification manifests, and claim boundaries for institutional review.

SETTLES
WORK
Canonical public institution

From raw contract console to GoalOS evidence architecture.

AGIJobManager is the on-chain settlement machine. This repository is the public institution around it: the evidence room, verification surface, operator guide, manifest layer, and autonomous GitHub Pages publisher.

10legacy lifecycle actions
0wallet auto-connect calls
1canonical production URL
6.1Evidence Docket posture
Institutional operating law

No proof, no settlement. No eval, no propagation. No rollback, no release.

The site separates explanation, evidence, and execution. It provides public proof surfaces and read-only intent generation, while keeping Mainnet signing outside the website.

Operator Console

Generate unsigned GoalOS intent JSON for review. No wallet connection or transaction broadcasting.
